title: Superlativos
summary: The biggest, the smallest, the best.

teach.target: Le catto es le plus parve.
teach.roman: le catto es le plus parve
teach.ipa: le kˈato es le plˈus pˈarve

teach.target: Iste question es le minus importante.
teach.roman: iste question es le minus importante
teach.english: This question is the least important.
teach.ipa: ˈiste kwestjˈon es le mˈinus ˌimportˈante

grammar.title: Superlatives
grammar.body:
Just add **le** in front of the comparative: plus grande (bigger) → le plus grande (the biggest). Same for minus: minus importante → le minus importante (the least important).
No separate superlative form to memorize — comparative + le does the whole job.

canDo: Say something is the biggest, smallest, best, or least important
